selected_dialects.reason: Prismatic rectangular block with extrude_rectangle base, holes on multiple orthogonal faces (top P-port, front work-ports, right drain-port), corner mounting holes, and chamfer — all matching sketch_extrude_base main_ops: extrude_rectangle, cut_hole, cut_hole_pattern_linear (for 4-corner pattern), apply_safe_chamfer.
Multiple independent hole features on different faces (top, front, right) must be positioned and combined; composition provides boolean_cut across components.

safety_notes: Reference geometry only — not for manufacturing. No CFD, no FEA, no structural validation, no certification implied.
